## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] Tests were written first or the exception is explained.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes.
- [ ] Relevant Cypress journeys pass.
- [ ] Keyboard, screen-reader, reduced-motion, and mobile impacts were checked.
- [ ] Provider types do not leak into feature UI.
- [ ] Values, timestamps, provenance, and stale states remain scientifically honest.

## Source-of-truth documentation

- [ ] I updated the owning document(s) under `docs/docs/`.
- [ ] I updated the Sprint/story status in `05-agile-roadmap-backlog.md`.
- [ ] I added or updated an ADR for any material decision.
- [ ] Documentation is unchanged because: <!-- explain -->
